coverage_note: The bundled SCN5A population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SCN5A cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000183873: SCN5A coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: SCN5A findings should be read against cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1805124 (SCN5A H558R) is curated as a SCN5A marker for Cardiac conduction and arrhythmia biology, Brugada/long-QT/conduction disease review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

SCN5A pathogenic channelopathy model is curated as a SCN5A marker for Cardiac conduction and arrhythmia biology, Brugada/long-QT/conduction disease review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
